title: Stir Fry Dumplings
description: A simple and delicious Irish-inspired stir fry dish made with juicy dumplings. This recipe is perfect for a quick dinner or lunch.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the olive oil and cook for 1 minute.
Add the ground beef or pork and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the chopped cabbage and cook for 2-3 minutes, until it starts to soften.
Add the stir fry seasoning and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the dumplings to the skillet or wok and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they're cooked through.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with green onions if desired.
Cook's Note: You can also add other vegetables like carrots or bell peppers to the stir fry if you like.
Cook's Note: If using homemade dumplings, make sure to cook them according to the package instructions.
